query:
-- Check the last 5 pipeline runs for context
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  DATE_FORMAT(startedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i UTC') as started,
  DATE_FORMAT(completedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i UTC') as completed,
  ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(completedAt) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(startedAt)) / 60, 1) as durationMins,
  articlesIngested,
  projectsCreated,
  contactsEnriched,
  triggeredBy,
  lastActivityNote
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
